steps.title: Focus on classification orders
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the different orders in which Australian invertebrates are classified. The response therefore needs to name more than one order and connect each order to the animals in the notes.

steps.title: Reject single-order details
steps.content: A and D each focus on only one order. C shifts to threatened populations instead of contrasting classification orders. The choice that names both Hymenoptera and Coleoptera meets the goal. The answer is B.
